title: Hula Hoop Kid
prompt: A hula hoop spinning on a kid's waist, gradually climbing to their chest, then dropping to knees, then clattering to the floor. They pick it up to try again.
description: A playful scene of a child spinning a hula hoop — the hoop climbs from waist to chest, drops to knees, then clatters to the floor. The kid picks it up and tries again.
description_zh: 一个孩子转呼啦圈的有趣场景——呼啦圈从腰部爬升到胸部，然后掉到膝盖，最后哐当落地。孩子捡起来再试一次。
author: HappyHorse Team

title: Golf Ball Putt
prompt: A golf ball in a cup rolling around the rim three times before finally dropping in. The golfer's body language matches each rotation. Audio: Ball rattle, exhale, plop.
description: A golf ball rolls around the rim of the cup three times before finally dropping in. The golfer's body language perfectly matches each rotation — tension, hope, and relief.
description_zh: 高尔夫球在球洞边沿滚动三圈后终于落入。球手的肢体语言完美配合每一次旋转——紧张、期待、释然。
author: HappyHorse Team

title: Cat & Toaster Reflection
prompt: A cat staring at its own reflection in a toaster, paw tapping the chrome surface. The distorted cat reflection taps back. Audio: Paw taps, confused meow.
description: A cat stares at its own distorted reflection in a chrome toaster, tapping the surface with its paw. The reflection taps back.
description_zh: 一只猫盯着烤面包机铬面上自己扭曲的倒影，用爪子轻拍表面。倒影也回拍了过来。
author: HappyHorse Team

title: Barista Latte Art
prompt: A barista creating latte art by pouring steamed milk into espresso. The white milk submerges beneath the brown crema initially, then breaks through the surface as the cup fills. The barista's wrist makes precise oscillating movements, creating a rosetta pattern. The milk and espresso maintain their distinct colors while interacting at the boundary. Audio: The gentle pour of liquid, the hiss of the steam wand in the background.
description: A barista creates a rosetta latte art pattern by pouring steamed milk into espresso. The milk submerges beneath the crema initially, then breaks through as the cup fills.
description_zh: 咖啡师将蒸汽牛奶倒入浓缩咖啡制作玫瑰花拉花。牛奶先沉入咖啡脂下方，随后在杯子填满时突破表面。
author: HappyHorse Team

title: Flower Bloom & Wilt Timelapse
prompt: A flower blooming and wilting over two weeks, one photo per day. Same vase, same window, same angle. Light changes with weather. Audio: Quiet domestic.
description: A two-week timelapse of a flower blooming and wilting — one photo per day, same vase, same window, same angle. Light changes naturally with the weather.
description_zh: 两周花开花落延时摄影——每天一张照片，同一花瓶、同一窗户、同一角度。光线随天气自然变化。
author: HappyHorse Team
